title: ixora pendula var. montana
intro: Ixora pendula var. montana, also known as the mountain ixora, is a variety of flowering plant in the Rubiaceae family, native to the tropical regions of the Western Ghats in India. It has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Ixora pendula var. montana include its potential to reduce fever, relieve pain, and treat various skin conditions such as wounds, eczema, and acne. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and flowers can be used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
